   168→    GenericArg {
   169→        /// The generic argument list containing the generic arg
   170→        args: Option<ast::GenericArgList>,
   171→        /// `Some(trait_)` if `trait_` is being instantiated with `args`
   172→        of_trait: Option<hir::Trait>,
   173→        /// The generic parameter being filled in by the generic arg
   174→        corresponding_param: Option<ast::GenericParam>,
   175→    },
   176→    /// Associated type equality constraint e.g. `Foo<Bar = $0>`
   177→    AssocTypeEq,
   178→    /// Associated constant equality constraint e.g. `Foo<X = $0>`
   179→    AssocConstEq,
   180→    TypeBound,
   181→    ImplTarget,
   182→    ImplTrait,
   183→    Other,
   184→}
   185→
   186→impl TypeLocation {
   187→    pub(crate) fn complete_lifetimes(&self) -> bool {
   188→        matches!(
   189→            self,
   190→            TypeLocation::GenericArg {
   191→                corresponding_param: Some(ast::GenericParam::LifetimeParam(_)),
   192→                ..
   193→            }
   194→        )
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    pub(crate) fn complete_consts(&self) -> bool {
   198→        matches!(
   199→            self,
   200→            TypeLocation::GenericArg {
   201→                corresponding_param: Some(ast::GenericParam::ConstParam(_)),
   202→                ..
   203→            } | TypeLocation::AssocConstEq
   204→        )
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    pub(crate) fn complete_types(&self) -> bool {
   208→        match self {
   209→            TypeLocation::GenericArg { corresponding_param: Some(param), .. } => {
   210→                matches!(param, ast::GenericParam::TypeParam(_))
   211→            }
   212→            TypeLocation::AssocConstEq => false,
   213→            TypeLocation::AssocTypeEq => true,
   214→            TypeLocation::ImplTrait => false,
   215→            _ => true,
   216→        }
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    pub(crate) fn complete_self_type(&self) -> bool {
   220→        self.complete_types() && !matches!(self, TypeLocation::ImplTarget | TypeLocation::ImplTrait)
